subject: Simplify pricing calculator to focus on equilibrium analysis
body:
Major changes:
- Reduce from 20 models to 5 core pricing models
- Remove growth projections (churn, expansion, etc.)
- Implement static unit economics (no month-by-month)
- Add seller perspective (cost to serve + margin analysis)
- Add buyer perspective (value received + ROI analysis)
- Add equilibrium analysis (seller floor vs buyer ceiling)
- Create SA pricing defaults file with realistic ZAR prices
- Update README to reflect simplified approach

Models now included:
1. Subscription (SaaS)
2. Usage-Based (API, transactions, etc.)
3. Per-Seat (per user)
4. One-Time Purchase (perpetual license)
5. Marketplace (two-sided commission)

Each model now calculates:
- Revenue, costs, profit, margin
- Seller minimum price to meet margin goals
- Buyer maximum price based on value received
- Equilibrium zone where both parties win
title: Simplify pricing calculator to focus on equilibrium analysis
